description: ContactPicker accepts optional onAddNew prop and renders separator + '+ Add new contact' button at bottom of contact list when provided
ContactPicker button calls onAddNew() and closes the dropdown (setIsOpen(false))
ContactPicker renders identically to current when onAddNew is not provided (backward compatible)
QuickAddTicket wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact dialog with selectedClientId pre-filled
QuickAddTicket auto-selects newly created contact after QuickAddContact dialog closes
TicketProperties wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact with ticket's company_id
QuickAddInteraction wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact with selectedClientId
OverallInteractionsFeed wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact
ProjectQuickAdd wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact with selectedClientId
Projects (list/filter) wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact
ClientDetails wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact with clientId
BillingConfigForm wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact
UserManagement wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact
EntraReconciliationQueue wires ContactPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddContact
ClientPicker accepts optional onAddNew prop and renders separator + '+ Add new client' button at bottom of client list when provided
ClientPicker button calls onAddNew() and closes the dropdown
ClientPicker renders identically to current when onAddNew is not provided (backward compatible)
QuickAddTicket wires ClientPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddClient dialog and auto-selects new client
ProjectQuickAdd wires ClientPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddClient and auto-selects new client
ContractBasicsStep wires ClientPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddClient and auto-selects new client
ManualInvoices wires ClientPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddClient and auto-selects new client
QuickAddAsset wires ClientPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddClient and auto-selects new client
QuickAddCategory component extracted from CategoriesSettings inline dialog into packages/tickets/src/components/QuickAddCategory.tsx
QuickAddCategory accepts preselectedBoardId prop and hides board selector when provided
QuickAddCategory shows category name input, board selector (when no preselectedBoardId), and optional parent category dropdown
QuickAddCategory uses createCategory action and calls onCategoryCreated callback on success
QuickAddCategory fetches boards internally if not provided via props
CategoriesSettings refactored to use QuickAddCategory component instead of inline dialog JSX
CategoriesSettings behavior unchanged after refactor (create and edit both work)
TreeSelect accepts optional onAddNew prop and renders separator + button at bottom of options list
CategoryPicker accepts optional onAddNew prop and passes it through to TreeSelect
QuickAddTicket wires CategoryPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddCategory with boardId pre-selected, auto-selects new category
TicketInfo wires CategoryPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddCategory with ticket's board_id, auto-selects new category
TicketingDashboard wires CategoryPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddCategory
TicketDetails wires CategoryPicker onAddNew to open QuickAddCategory with board context
